columns.Name: ESIGNATURE_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of the table. System generated.

columns.Name: OBJECT_TYPE
columns.Comments: The type of object to which the Esignature is related.

columns.Name: OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: The primary key of the object to which the current ESignature is related.

columns.Name: VALUE_HASH
columns.Comments: Hash of the value provided when using ESignature.

columns.Name: IP_ADDRESS
columns.Comments: IP adress of the HTTP connection when ESignature get used.

columns.Name: FULL_NAME
columns.Comments: Signee's full name at the moment of the ESignature.

columns.Name: SIGNATURE_DATE
columns.Comments: Date time when eSignature was used.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: DISCRIMINANT_OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: Column introduced to support multiple secondary esignatures per object type. Will store the Primary key of the discriminant object.

columns.Name: DISCRIMINANT_OBJECT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Column introduced to support multiple secondary esignatures per object type. Will store the lookup code of the discriminant object.
